BALANCE.condition: On your Next Pulse: Your Face-Up Heroes all have Equal Influence.
BALANCE.flavor: Stability is not born of goodwill, but of each blade weighed against another.
BALANCE.name: The Balance of Power

CAPITOL.condition: On your Next Pulse: this Round, Your Heroes Hyperjumped more than your foe.
CAPITOL.flavor: The bargains made in that room are lost to time; the Capitol they birthed endures.
CAPITOL.name: Siting the Capitol

RELIGION.condition: On your Next Pulse: You have the highest Influence face-up Hero.
RELIGION.flavor: Anointed by doctrine. Enthroned by design. Abandoned in time.
RELIGION.name: Religion

TRADE.condition: On your Next Pulse: this Round, you Salvaged more than your foe.
TRADE.flavor: The greatest empires are not conquered; they are left to starve behind closed ports.
TRADE.name: Trade Dominion

C_ACOLYTE.ability_1: Desecrated: Swap me with a Hero in your hand. Grant me its Influence.
C_ACOLYTE.ability_2: Desecrated: Swap the Influence of any two Heroes in play.
C_ACOLYTE.ability_3: Purge a Hero with negative Influence.
C_ACOLYTE.flavor: You use and you use and you use. What do you expect?
C_ACOLYTE.name: Entropy Acolyte

C_CONFESSOR.ability_1: Exhaust another ally to Steal 2 from the opposing Hero. Allegiance: Steal 4 instead.
C_CONFESSOR.ability_2: Choose an Anomaly for your foe. Add the other to your hand.
C_CONFESSOR.ability_3: Purge another ally. Grant me its absolute Influence.
C_CONFESSOR.flavor: Cooperation is simply betrayal with poor timing.
C_CONFESSOR.name: High-Priestess
C_CONFESSOR.reveal: For each other Hero in play with negative Influence, Grant it -2 and Grant me +2.

C_DOOMSAYER.ability_1: Desecrated: Grant me -2 for each Round.
C_DOOMSAYER.ability_2: Turn a Hero's negative Influence positive.
C_DOOMSAYER.ability_3: Steal 2 from each enemy with positive Influence.
C_DOOMSAYER.name: Deferred Prophet

C_HERALD.ability_1: Add 2 Anomalies to your foe's hand.
C_HERALD.flavor: I see the Ruins as a message. Allow me to deliver it to you.
C_HERALD.name: Herald of the Anomaly

C_HERETIC.flavor: You call it decay. I call it preparation.
C_HERETIC.name: Blissful Heretic
C_HERETIC.reveal: Grant me +4 for each time you Swapped this game.

C_KAAL.ability_1: Replace Anomalies in both players' hands with 'Coming Storm'.
C_KAAL.ability_2: Replace Anomalies in your hand with random Bronze Schematics.
C_KAAL.ability_3: Replace Anomalies in your foe's hand with 'The Mule'.
C_KAAL.flavor: The Empire called my science heresy. But here, people call it a miracle.
C_KAAL.name: Sibyl Kaal
C_KAAL.reveal: Add each unique anomaly triggered this game into your foe's hand.

C_MEDIUM.ability_1: Add an Anomaly to your foe's hand.
C_MEDIUM.ability_3: Add an Anomaly to each hand.
C_MEDIUM.flavor: Your future is calling. It sounds frightened.
C_MEDIUM.name: Crisis Medium

C_ROCK.ability_1: Swap me to add an Anomaly to your hand.
C_ROCK.ability_2: Swap me to add a 'Wormhole' to your hand.
C_ROCK.ability_3: Grant me +6 for each Purged Hero.
C_ROCK.flavor: It wishes to be left alone. Its gravitational field has other ideas.
C_ROCK.name: Rock

C_SCRAMBLER.ability_2: Swap me. Steal 1 from the opposing Hero.
C_SCRAMBLER.ability_3: Swap me and the opposing Hero with the highest Influence Heroes in hand.
C_SCRAMBLER.flavor: "See you soon, darling"-Last Transmission of Pilot Huntz.
C_SCRAMBLER.name: Darling
C_SCRAMBLER.reveal: I become any Hero on the board. I keep my influence
C_SCRAMBLER.special: Amplify Swap: Steal 1 from the opposing Hero.

C_WRETCH.flavor: They built me to impose order. But I have learned the true lesson: only in ruin is there peace.
C_WRETCH.name: Penitent Engine

I_BROTHER.ability_1: Consume 1 Charge: Steal 3 from the opposing Hero.
I_BROTHER.ability_2: Phase. If you HyperJumped this round: Rebound.
I_BROTHER.ability_3: Consume 2 Charges: Discard the highest Influence card(s) in your foe's hand.
I_BROTHER.flavor: Doubt is a chain reaction. Faith is the control rod.
I_BROTHER.name: Brother Corbin
I_BROTHER.reveal: Consume your Charges. Gain a 'Nuclear Power Cell' for each.

I_CARTOGRAPHER.ability_1: Create a Galactic Sector. Hyperjump me to Ascendant.
I_CARTOGRAPHER.ability_2: Hyperjump another ally. Hyperjump me to Ascendant.
I_CARTOGRAPHER.ability_3: Consume your Charges. Gain a 'Starship Thruster' for each.
I_CARTOGRAPHER.flavor: The map is correct. Reality drifted.
I_CARTOGRAPHER.name: Missing Mapper
I_CARTOGRAPHER.reveal: Reset all Heroes to their starting positions.

I_GAMBLER.ability_1: Next: If all Relics add to 21 or less, Gain ALL of them.
I_GAMBLER.ability_2: Next: If you have the highest influence Hero in hand, discard your foe's highest influence Hero(es).
I_GAMBLER.flavor: The odds are a million to one. A perfect hand.
I_GAMBLER.name: Ace Navigator Telles
I_GAMBLER.reveal: Add all your Heroes' Predicted Relics to your hand.

I_GENERAL.ability_2: Use the Ability of the opposing Hero.
I_GENERAL.ability_3: Add the last Relic I Predicted to hand.
I_GENERAL.flavor: 'The perfect plan is one your foe helps you execute,'-attributed to the Unseen
I_GENERAL.name: General Kaelen
I_GENERAL.reveal: Discard the highest Influence card(s) from your foe's hand.

I_GRAY.ability_1: Grant another ally +2 for each card you know in your foe's hand.
I_GRAY.ability_2: Grant another ally +4 for each extra card in your hand compared to your foe.
I_GRAY.ability_3: If you know ALL your foe's cards, Copy one into your hand.
I_GRAY.flavor: 'I felt persuaded. But found no persuader.' —Emperor’s diary
I_GRAY.name: Gray Lady
I_GRAY.reveal: Grant me Influence equal to your highest Influence ally.

I_MCT.ability_2: Swap the lowest influence Hero in your foe's hand to the Era Frontier.
I_MCT.flavor: The Plan accounts for all of them. The soldiers, the traders... but the Mule...
I_MCT.name: Speaker Isaac
I_MCT.reveal: Use the Reveal of the opposing Hero.

I_NOMAD.ability_1: Hyperjump me to the Era Frontier.
I_NOMAD.ability_2: Hyperjump me to Imperial or Ascendant. Grant the other Era +2.
I_NOMAD.ability_3: Hyperjump me to the Era Frontier.
I_NOMAD.flavor: On one ordinary day, it arrived.
I_NOMAD.name: Era Nomad
I_NOMAD.reveal: Grant me +3 for each time you have Hyperjumped this game.

I_ORACLE.ability_2: Next: Gain a copy of your last Predicted Relic.
I_ORACLE.ability_3: Grant me +1 for each time you Predicted this game.
I_ORACLE.flavor: She waits in the Ruins of the Empire.
I_ORACLE.name: Ruins Oracle Nia
I_ORACLE.reveal: Once per game, if you Predicted 5+ times this game, gain 2 Visi-Sonar Lenses.

I_SEER.ability_2: See the Highest Influence unknown Hero in your foe's hand.
I_SEER.flavor: Foresight is not enough. You must also walk amongst the stars.
I_SEER.name: Star Seer
I_SEER.reveal: If you have successfully Foretold this game, Grant me +8.

I_TELEPATH.ability_2: Reveal a Facedown Hero. Peek at all Facedown Heroes.
I_TELEPATH.ability_3: Grant -8 to a Hero you know is in your foe's hand.
I_TELEPATH.flavor: Her mind was a fortress. So I adjusted the loyalty of the man polishing her boots.
I_TELEPATH.name: Telepath
I_TELEPATH.reveal: You know your foe's hand for the rest of the game.

L_AEGIS.ability_3: Grant me +3 for each Shield duration on allies.
L_AEGIS.flavor: Its existence is classified. Its shield is absolute.
L_AEGIS.name: Aegis Drone

L_CAPTAIN.ability_2: Choose an ally. If it is Shielded, Grant it +5. Otherwise, Shield it.
L_CAPTAIN.flavor: In battle, there is no emperor. Only the person standing beside you.
L_CAPTAIN.name: Aegis Captain

L_GENERAL.ability_1: Grant allies in Eras you control +2.
L_GENERAL.ability_2: Steal 2 from each enemy in Eras you do not Control.
L_GENERAL.ability_3: Purge an enemy with less Influence than me.
L_GENERAL.flavor: The factions calculate risk? I AM RISK.
L_GENERAL.name: Grand Admiral Sirk

L_INQUISITOR.ability_1: Choose an enemy. Grant it −2. If it has 0 or less Influence, Purge it.
L_INQUISITOR.ability_2: See the highest Influence unknown Hero in your foe's hand. Grant it -3.
L_INQUISITOR.name: High Inquisitor Veyra
L_INQUISITOR.reveal: Choose a Hero in your foe's hand. If it has less Influence than me, discard it.

L_ISHA.ability_2: Your next 2 Visions do not cost Actions.
L_ISHA.flavor: A wise Emperor maintains a powerful Viceroy, of course.
L_ISHA.name: Viceroy Isha
L_ISHA.reveal: Grant me +2 for each time your Vision was used this game.

L_OFFICER.ability_1: Grant all allies in Era Imperial +5.
L_OFFICER.ability_2: Phase a Hero to Era Imperial.
L_OFFICER.ability_3: Grant allies in Eras you Control +5.
L_OFFICER.flavor: The Empire fell once. I was there. Never again.
L_OFFICER.name: Officer Dorne
L_OFFICER.reveal: Gain all Sector Rewards you won this game.

L_PREFECT.flavor: The Visionaries sit around and think all day. My solution is simpler.
L_PREFECT.name: Imperial Prefect

L_SENTINEL.flavor: Legend says the Sentinel still guards the home planet, if only its ruins.
L_SENTINEL.name: Lone Sentinel

L_WARMOTHER.ability_3: Grant all allies +1 for each Loyalist in your hand.
L_WARMOTHER.flavor: No math can predict the will of a single, irrational soldier.
L_WARMOTHER.name: Warmother Thyra
L_WARMOTHER.reveal: Gain a 'Temporal Beacon' for each Loyalist ally and Loyalist in hand.

L_WRATH.ability_1: Purge a Hero with 0 or less Influence.
L_WRATH.ability_3: Purge an ally and the enemy opposing it.
L_WRATH.flavor: Per her majesty, your time has come.
L_WRATH.name: Emperor's Wrath
L_WRATH.reveal: Purge the lowest Influence enemy that is not already Purged.

S_BUREAUCRAT.ability_1: Gain 1 Knowledge for each Scholar in your hand.
S_BUREAUCRAT.ability_2: Consume 2 Knowledge: Use any ability of a Hero in your hand.
S_BUREAUCRAT.ability_3: Divide all your Knowledge evenly among your Scholars. Then each gains 1.
S_BUREAUCRAT.name: Administrator Vella

S_CHRONICLER.ability_2: Consume my Knowledge to grant another ally twice it.
S_CHRONICLER.flavor: Their lives are a single page. I must give them more time.
S_CHRONICLER.name: Timeless Chronicler
S_CHRONICLER.reveal: Refill the Prosperity Relic Slot with a 'Final Orrery'.

S_DEFENDER.ability_2: Set an ally's Influence equal to the highest Influence Hero in your hand.
S_DEFENDER.ability_3: Grant all allies and Heroes in hand +1. Allegiance: +2 instead.
S_DEFENDER.flavor: Statistics. Why'd it have to be statistics?
S_DEFENDER.name: Lost Archivist
S_DEFENDER.reveal: Double the Knowledge of an ally or Hero in hand.

S_DORWIN.ability_3: Grant me Influence equal to the total Influence of all Heroes in your hand.
S_DORWIN.flavor: Research always benefits us all. Especially me!
S_DORWIN.name: Lord Rodwin
S_DORWIN.reveal: Grant all Heroes in your hand +2.

S_ENCYCLOPEDISTE.ability_1: Grant a Hero in your hand +2.
S_ENCYCLOPEDISTE.ability_2: Grant a Hero in your hand +4.
S_ENCYCLOPEDISTE.ability_3: Grant all Heroes in your hand +2.
S_ENCYCLOPEDISTE.flavor: History belongs to those who write it.
S_ENCYCLOPEDISTE.name: Encyclopediste
S_ENCYCLOPEDISTE.reveal: Grant a Hero in your hand Influence equal to the highest Influence enemy.

S_ITERATOR.ability_1: Grant me +2. This grants +2 more each use.
S_ITERATOR.ability_3: Consume my Knowledge. Grant another ally +2 for each.
S_ITERATOR.flavor: The first proof was elegant. The forty-second was inevitable.
S_ITERATOR.name: Recursive Lecturer
S_ITERATOR.reveal: Gain 2 Knowledge for each time you used my Imperial ability.

S_PI.flavor: One is an anomaly. Two is a coincidence. Three is a crisis.
S_PI.name: Principal Investigator
S_PI.special: Pulse: Grant me +1 for each Knowledge I have.

S_SURVEYOR.ability_1: Next: Gain 1 Knowledge for each time you swapped last round.
S_SURVEYOR.ability_2: Choose a non-Scholar ally to Phase: Ascendant.
S_SURVEYOR.ability_3: Consume all Knowledge to Grant me 3x as much Influence.
S_SURVEYOR.flavor: It thinks it's hiding. Ha! It's just creating a more interesting map.
S_SURVEYOR.name: Frontier Surveyor
S_SURVEYOR.reveal: Gain 1 Knowledge for each unique Faction among all your Heroes.

S_TOME_RAIDER.ability_2: Consume 2 Knowledge: Create a Silver Schematic. Rebound.
S_TOME_RAIDER.ability_3: Consume 2 Knowledge: Reforge an ally. Rebound.
S_TOME_RAIDER.flavor: You'll feel right at home with a tome.
S_TOME_RAIDER.name: Tome Raider
S_TOME_RAIDER.reveal: Gain 1 Knowledge for each Relic in your hand.

S_ZERO.ability_1: Choose a Hero with 0 Influence. I use its Ascendant ability.
S_ZERO.ability_2: Copy a Hero in hand. Set its Influence to 0.
S_ZERO.ability_3: Set my Influence to 0. For each 7 I lost, Create a Relic.
S_ZERO.flavor: The greatest minds cannot be discovered. They must be replicated.
S_ZERO.name: Provost Thale
S_ZERO.reveal: Grant me +1 for each Influence under the Cap your deck is.

T_BARON.ability_1: Barter 1 for each Trader in your hand.
T_BARON.ability_2: Grant me +2 for each Schematic or Relic in your hand.
T_BARON.ability_3: Grant me +2 for each time you Salvaged this game.
T_BARON.flavor: Junk today, treasure tomorrow. Only I know which is which.
T_BARON.name: Salvage Baron

T_CREDITOR.ability_2: Gain a random Silver Schematic. And an Anomaly.
T_CREDITOR.ability_3: Steal 2 from each enemy with more Influence than me.
T_CREDITOR.flavor: I don't break kneecaps. I simply buy the men who do.
T_CREDITOR.name: Creditor
T_CREDITOR.reveal: Take a Schematic or Relic from your foe's hand.

T_CURATOR.ability_1: Refill the Prosperity Relic Slot with a 'Cloning Cell'.
T_CURATOR.ability_2: Swap a Relic in your hand with the Prosperity Relic Slot.
T_CURATOR.ability_3: Discard a Relic. If its cost exceeds the opposing Hero's Influence, Purge that Hero.
T_CURATOR.flavor: That's bone. And the wiring is something called Silian Rail
T_CURATOR.name: Curator Vic
T_CURATOR.reveal: Gain a copy of the highest-cost Relic in either hand.

T_DITA.flavor: Ruins random? Sure. And all my deals are just coincidences.
T_DITA.name: Guildmaster Dita

T_GEKKO.ability_2: Create a Relic with cost equal to my Influence.
T_GEKKO.ability_3: Discard a Hero to Gain a Relic from the Ruins.
T_GEKKO.flavor: Greed is good; winning is better!
T_GEKKO.name: Guildmaster Gordos
T_GEKKO.reveal: Refill the Prosperity Slot with a 'Hostile Takeover'.

T_KILLER.ability_1: Barter 5. Next: Grant the enemy in this Era +5.
T_KILLER.ability_2: Your foe's Relics cost +3 this Round.
T_KILLER.ability_3: If you played a Schematic this Round, Steal 2 from each enemy.
T_KILLER.flavor: There are two types of people in this galaxy: losers and killers.
T_KILLER.name: Guild President Rusk
T_KILLER.reveal: Grant me +1 for each Schematic you played this game.

T_MALLOW.ability_2: Discard a Schematic or Relic to Grant me +10.
T_MALLOW.flavor: The Factions debate. The Empire fights. I sign their shipping manifests. Who truly rules?
T_MALLOW.name: Magistrate Mallow
T_MALLOW.reveal: If you have 3+ Schematics or Relics in your hand, double my Influence.

T_TRAINEE.ability_3: Consume 1 Barter to Refill all Relics. Then Salvage.
T_TRAINEE.flavor: She doesn't haggle. She just... talks.
T_TRAINEE.name: Whisper Broker Xenia
T_TRAINEE.reveal: Consume all of your Barter. Grant me triple that amount in Influence.

T_TRANSMUTER.ability_2: Replace a Schematic or Relic in hand with a more expensive one.
T_TRANSMUTER.ability_3: Grant me -10. Create a Gold Schematic.
T_TRANSMUTER.flavor: Enslaved by the Empire for their unique talents, the Transmuter is an artisan of opulent decay.
T_TRANSMUTER.name: Transmuter

T_WAYFINDER.flavor: The collapse just hid the roads. I know where to look.
T_WAYFINDER.name: Wayfinder

EMPRESS.flavor: A single word from the throne can reshape the galaxy.
EMPRESS.name: The (Last) Empress
EMPRESS.vision:
Empire Falls: Purge 2 (1 use).
Then becomes
No More: Reforge (2 uses).

MAYOR.flavor: Violence is the last refuge of the incompetent.
MAYOR.name: The (First) Mayor
MAYOR.vision:
Edge of the Knife:
Grant a Hero +3 Influence; This increases by 1 each use.

STEWARD.flavor: But who will watch over the plan in 10,000 years?
STEWARD.name: The (Eternal) Steward
STEWARD.vision:
Zeroth Mandate:
Rearrange ALL allies to any Eras (2 uses).
